name: Persimmon Jam
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the persimmons and remove the stem ends.
2. Pass the fruit through a food mill or coarse strainer to extract the pulp.
3. Measure out 4 cups of persimmon pulp into a deep saucepan.
4. Stir in the lemon juice and powdered pectin until well combined.
5. Heat the mixture over high heat until it reaches boiling point, stirring constantly.
6. Continue boiling without stirring for 4 minutes.
7. Remove from heat and let the mixture cool while alternating between gentle stirring and skimming any foam off the surface for about 5 minutes.
8. Spoon the hot jam into sterilized jars and seal them securely.
Makes about 8 half-pints
